case_title: CITIBROKERS, INC. VS. RICHARD KOWANA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION DAVID P. WASSERMAN FILED RE: LOST LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS, INC. SERVED FEB-16-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOWANA, RICHARD
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KOWANA, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $13.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS, INC. SERVED FEB-16-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT KOWANA, RICHARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOWANA, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 406 KANSAS STREET, UNIT NUMBER 5, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KOWANA, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KOWANA, RICHARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KOWANA, RICHARD
